title: WriteFileTool arbitrary file write via unvalidated file_path
description: The WriteFileTool._call() method passes the LLM-controlled file_path parameter directly to this.store.writeFile(file_path, text) without validating that the path falls within the configured workspace or base directory. An attacker can instruct the LLM to write files to arbitrary locations on the server filesystem, including sensitive paths like ~/.ssh/authorized_keys or /etc/ld.so.preload, leading to remote code execution.
